name: Joseph the Hymnographer and George of Maleum
kontakia: (Tone 4) You are a never-ending fountain of lasting penance,* an unending river of comfort, and a depth of goodness, O Joseph.* Give us tears of celestial repentance* by which we might cry out in seeking your help* and find comfort from God through you, O holy one.

(Tone 3) You sought to be a friend of Christ,* and so you turned from worldly distraction.* You lived like an angel on earth, O George.* Therefore, we are in awe of your holy passing.* Beg Christ our God to have mercy on us.
